name: Financial Research MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for financial research enabling AI agents to analyze stocks with summaries, analyst price targets, and buy/sell recommendations. Enables agents to track market sentiment through analyst consensus data — supporting investment research and financial analysis workflows.
use_cases: Analyzing stocks with analyst price targets from investment research agents
Checking Wall Street consensus ratings for stocks from portfolio analysis agents
Generating stock summary reports with analyst recommendations for research agents
Building financial research workflows with analyst sentiment data
not_for: Automated trading execution (research only, not trading)
Real-time order book or Level 2 data (analyst recommendations focus)
Teams requiring verified, licensed financial data with SLA guarantees
best_when: A financial researcher or investor wants AI agents to quickly synthesize analyst recommendations and price targets for stocks — enabling research-augmented investment analysis.
avoid_when: You need real-time trading data or execution. Also: ALWAYS verify financial data independently before making investment decisions — AI research tools supplement, not replace, due diligence.

auth.notes: Financial data API key required (likely Alpha Vantage or similar). Source depends on implementation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Depends on underlying financial data API
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid tiers for higher data volume and premium data
pricing.notes: MCP server from tutorials repo — evaluate production readiness carefully.

performance.rate_limits: Underlying financial API rate limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Analyst recommendations used for investment decisions — verify independently
Tutorial origin (hollaugo/tutorials) suggests educational rather than production quality
Analyst data freshness is critical — stale recommendations can be misleading
Data source and accuracy not clearly documented — validate before relying on it
Community/tutorial tool — limited maintenance and support
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Analyst data for investment decisions. Verify independently. Tutorial-origin tool — evaluate production readiness carefully. API key security required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial research tool. Verify data sources. Tutorial-origin — evaluate production readiness. API key security.
